arts.ttl: Arsenal 'interested' in striker alternative to Alexander Isak previously linked to Manchester United
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly developing strong interest in a striker who Manchester United hold interest in, with Mikel Arteta searching for an Alexander Isak alternative.

arts.ttl: Inside the rise and fall of Brandon Williams: Former £3.4m-per-year Man United star faces up to two YEARS in prison after crashing his car at 99mph
arts.sum: Living the high life as a home-grown Manchester United star, footballer Brandon Williams posted pictures showing him aboard a private jet, on exotic holidays and with expensive cars.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's 5 potential replacements for Bruno Fernandes as Real Madrid eye huge move
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes is gaining interest from Real Madrid amid claims he could leave for £90million this summer and Manchester United could soon have to start planning for their captain's succession in the event he leaves Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Amorim to force through €100m transfer that will save Man Utd
arts.sum: Plus, Arsenal finally announced their new sporting director and Chelsea were left facing a nightmare scenario. Arsenal have finally announced the appointment of Andrea Berta as their new sporting director.

arts.ttl: Man Utd identify exciting new target after Quenda hijack
arts.sum: Manchester United have begun scouting Como winger Assane Diao after missing out on Geovany Quenda, according to a report. According to Nicolo Schira, the Red Devils have begun scouting Como winger Assane Diao.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson Named the Best-Ever Manchester United Player He Managed
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson overlooked Cristiano Ronaldo, Wayne Rooney, Pauls Scholes and Eric Cantona when naming the best player he had at Man Utd.

arts.ttl: David de Gea Names the 5 Best Footballers He Played With at Man United
arts.sum: David de Gea named the five best players he ever played alongside during his time at Manchester United.
